title: That Old Black Magic: Skelly By Everlight

startPoint.en: Speak to 'No Gums' Murray in the City of Um's bandstand (or Lady Grey if he is not there yet).
startPoint.es: Habla con 'No Gums' Murray en el quiosco de música de City of Um (o con Lady Grey si él aún no ha llegado).

quests.title: That Old Black Magic: My One and Only Lute

children.name: Elemental I
children.display: 2 Elemental I, 1 Change I, and 1 Commune I

children.name: Basic ghostly ink
children.display: 13 basic ghostly ink and 2 regular ghostly ink from scratch

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: Archaeology journal for a quick teleport to the Everlight Dig Site

recommended.name: Underworld Grimoire
recommended.display: Underworld Grimoire for a quick teleport to the City of Um

recommended.name: Lesser ensoul material
recommended.display: Glyphs and focus for lesser ensoul material or lesser communion rituals with 1 Speed I or higher alteration glyph

children.name: Ectoplasm
children.display: 1 ectoplasm, 2 regular ghostly ink, 1 basic ghostly ink at minimum from scratch

text.en: Talk to 'No Gums' Murray in the City of Um's bandstand, behind Death, next to Lady Grey.
text.es: Habla con 'No Gums' Murray en el quiosco de música de City of Um, detrás de Death, junto a Lady Grey.

text.en: If Murray doesn't show up, perform any ritual using a Speed alteration glyph, Speed I, Speed II, or Speed III. Then, return and talk to him.
text.es: Si Murray no aparece, realiza cualquier ritual usando un glifo de alteración de Velocidad, Velocidad I, Velocidad II o Velocidad III. Después, vuelve y habla con él.

text.en: Talk to 'No Gums' Murray and attempt to give him the restored Everlight trumpet.
text.es: Habla con 'No Gums' Murray e intenta darle la trompeta Everlight restaurada.

text.en: If you don't have a restored Everlight trumpet, excavate amphitheatre debris in the Everlight Dig Site to obtain an Everlight trumpet (damaged) (or obtain it from any other source) and restore it.
text.es: Si no tienes una trompeta Everlight restaurada, excava los escombros del anfiteatro en el Everlight Dig Site para obtener una trompeta Everlight (dañada) (u obténla de cualquier otra fuente) y restáurala.

text.en: Perform ensoul trumpet ritual at the Um ritual site.
text.es: Realiza el ritual de infundir alma a la trompeta en el lugar de rituales de Um.

text.en: Take 'No Gums' Murray's trumpet from the ritual chest.
text.es: Coge la trompeta de 'No Gums' Murray del cofre ritual.

text.en: Return to 'No Gums' Murray and talk to him.
text.es: Vuelve con 'No Gums' Murray y habla con él.
